query: add an exported TypeScript `enum Role` with exactly three values named Admin, Editor, Viewer (in that order, any numeric or string underlying value). Then add a required field `role: Role` to the User interface (non-optional).
check: node --input-type=module -e "import {readFileSync} from 'node:fs';import a from 'node:assert/strict';const s=readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8');a.ok(/export\s+enum\s+Role\s*\{[\s\S]*?Admin[\s\S]*?Editor[\s\S]*?Viewer[\s\S]*?\}/m.test(s),'enum Role with Admin/Editor/Viewer missing');a.ok(/interface\s+User\s*\{[\s\S]*?\brole\s*:\s*Role\b[\s\S]*?\}/m.test(s),'role: Role field on User missing');a.ok(!/role\?\s*:\s*Role/.test(s),'role must be required, not optional');" $FILE

query: make the `name` field on User optional (append a `?` to the property key). Leave every other field and the Session/AuthState types alone.
check: node --input-type=module -e "import {readFileSync} from 'node:fs';import a from 'node:assert/strict';const s=readFileSync(process.argv[1],'utf8');a.ok(/interface\s+User\s*\{[\s\S]*?\bname\?\s*:\s*string[\s\S]*?\}/m.test(s),'name?: string missing on User');a.ok(/interface\s+Session\b/.test(s),'Session interface accidentally removed');a.ok(/type\s+AuthState\b/.test(s),'AuthState type accidentally removed');" $FILE
